category_sources: Official Safety documentation describes Safety CLI as a dependency vulnerability scanner for Python packages.
source_facts.description says it checks Python dependencies for known vulnerabilities and remediations.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub README use Safety CLI.
docs_sources: Official docs.safetycli.com documentation is the dedicated documentation domain for Safety CLI.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README for pyupio/safety identifies Safety CLI and links the documentation domain.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Safety CLI product page.
tags_sources: Official Safety docs describe scanning vulnerable and malicious packages and available CLI commands.
source_facts.description identifies Python dependency vulnerability checks.
